The Problem

That boat is costing you.

Marinas lose $800+ per week on abandoned vessels. Most owners keep paying storage on a boat they'll never use again.

💸

Bleeding Storage Fees

Monthly fees on a boat you haven't touched in years. That money is gone while the boat sits and deteriorates.

⚠️

Liability Risk

Leaking fuel, compliance violations, blocked slips — an aging vessel is a legal problem waiting to happen.

🌊

Sunken or Damaged?

We own a crane. In-water extractions, storm-damaged hulls, partially submerged vessels — we handle all of it.

📋

Paperwork Nightmare

Title transfer, DMV filings, disposal docs — 100% handled by us. You sign nothing.

Process

Four steps. Then it's gone.

From quote to disposal — one team, one transaction, zero stress.

01
📋

Submit a Quote

Fill out our quick form. We respond with a custom quote within 24 hours at no cost.

02
📞

Direct Call

You speak directly with our team. No call centers. We confirm details and schedule a date.

03
⚓

We Show Up

Our crew arrives with crane, trailer, and excavator. In-water or on land — we extract it completely.

04
✅

Gone. Done.

Demolition, recycling, disposal, and all paperwork filed. You're free.

Why Key Lime Maritime

Direct providers.
Not a call center.

Most "boat removal" websites are brokers who outsource. We own our yard, our equipment, and our process.

🏗️

We Own Our Equipment

Crane, heavy flatbed trailer, excavator — all ours. We show up ready, not waiting on a subcontractor.

📞

Direct Communication

You speak with Josiah and the Key Lime team directly. No automated systems, no dispatchers.

📜

All Paperwork Done

Title transfer, DMV documentation, disposal certification — we file everything. You're hands-off.

🌊

In-Water Extraction

Floating, sinking, or already sunk — our crane pulls vessels from the water. Most companies can't.

✅

One Transaction

Quote to disposal — one company, one price, one contact. We don't hand you off to anyone.

♻️

Proper Legal Disposal

Vessels are dismantled and disposed of the right way — no shortcuts, no dumping, ever.

Ready to be done with it?

One quote, one crew, one transaction. We handle everything from tow to disposal.
